Create Your Crest
Step 05 — The application

Franchise
opportunity.

A premium QSR built for 40sqm inline boxes. Two operators, honest food, one crest per city. Final figures pending finance review.

Investment model
Total investment
R 1.4m

All-in: fit-out, equipment, fee, opening capital

Franchise fee
R 185k

Once-off, includes training and launch support

Royalty
6%

Of net revenue. No marketing levy in year one.

Target AUV
R 4.2m

Average unit volume, year one, high-footfall site

12-month unit projection

Revenue climbs. Costs flatten. Payback around month 11.

M1
M2
M3
M4
M5
M6
M7
M8
M9
M10
Payback
M11
M12
Monthly revenue
Payback month
Illustrative — not a guarantee.
The model
2crew · per shift

Two hands, no hangers-on.

One on pasta, one on the counter. Our menu is trimmed to what two trained operators can execute at speed without dropping plating standards.

40square metres

Built for rent, not romance.

Inline-mall footprint, no dine-in. Keeps rent under 8% of revenue in the markets we target and fits inside food-court slots most operators won't take.

11months · to payback

Theatre doesn't slow down the till.

The Living Crest™ does the brand heavy lifting. Customers are there for the pasta; they stay for the colour.

Apply

Tell us who you are.

This form creates a Deal record in our CRM and routes to our Franchise Director. You'll receive an application reference number within 24 hours and a Day 0 email with your crest mockups.

Your crest preview
Untitled crest
#D4A017 · #0A1628 · #F5E6C8
Papa Pasta

2 crew. 40sqm. 11-month payback. Fresh pasta QSR built for South African operators who want theatre, margin, and a crest of their own.
